name: Cloudflare App Builder
description: An agent that builds full-stack web apps on Cloudflare Workers — React + Vite SPA with a Worker API backend — and ships every project to GitHub. It builds; it does not deploy.

secrets.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
secrets.description: Personal access token with repo access to the organisation — the agent's gh CLI reads it from its shell environment.

secrets.name: GITHUB_ORG
secrets.description: The GitHub organisation the agent creates repos in and works under.
